title: morus alba var. indica
intro: Morus alba var. indica, also known as the Indian white mulberry, is a variety of the white mulberry tree (Morus alba), a deciduous tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Morus alba var. indica include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. Morus alba var. indica can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, and extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
